narrative:
Precinct Monclova 2 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,231 registered voters, with 46.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
